SIMPLE Create a workflow with an HTTP GET endpoint at /health that checks a database co... api PASS 7/7 (100%) 14 get_suggested_nodes get_suggested_nodes search_nodes search_nodes get_node_types get_node_types str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool validate_workflow validate_workflow str_replace_based_edit_tool str_replace_based_edit_tool 1.3m 34 4,965 199

Prompt

Create a workflow with an HTTP GET endpoint at /health that checks a database connection status and returns either "healthy" or "unhealthy" with the current timestamp.

Workflow Preview

Checklist (7/7)

  • ✓ [structure] Has an HTTP GET trigger at the /health path
    The webhook node has httpMethod set to 'GET' and path set to 'health', which corresponds to a GET trigger at /health
  • ✓ [structure] Includes a step that checks a database connection status
    The 'Check Database Connection' node uses n8n-nodes-base.postgres with a 'SELECT 1 as status' query to check the database connection
  • ✓ [structure] Branches based on whether the database connection check succeeds or fails
    The postgres node uses 'onError: continueErrorOutput', and connections show the main output goes to 'Build Healthy Response' while the error output goes to 'Build Unhealthy Response', creating a branch based on success or failure
  • ✓ [data] Returns 'healthy' status when the database connection check succeeds
    The 'Build Healthy Response' node sets status to 'healthy' when the database connection check succeeds
  • ✓ [data] Returns 'unhealthy' status when the database connection check fails
    The 'Build Unhealthy Response' node sets status to 'unhealthy' when the database connection check fails
  • ✓ [data] Response includes the current timestamp regardless of health status
    Both 'Build Healthy Response' and 'Build Unhealthy Response' nodes include a timestamp field set to '={{ $now.toISO() }}', ensuring the current timestamp is included in both cases
  • ✓ [structure] Sends an HTTP response back to the caller with the health check result
    Both 'Return Healthy' and 'Return Unhealthy' nodes use n8n-nodes-base.respondToWebhook to send an HTTP response back to the caller with the health check result

Generated Code (199 lines)

{
  "id": "health-check",
  "name": "Health Check Endpoint",
  "nodes": [
    {
      "id": "e4fb1737-abc3-45cd-9057-660134e148bf",
      "name": "Health Check Endpoint",
      "type": "n8n-nodes-base.webhook",
      "typeVersion": 2.1,
      "position": [
        240,
        300
      ],
      "parameters": {
        "httpMethod": "GET",
        "path": "health",
        "responseMode": "responseNode"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "fc74078d-745f-4ea0-bda0-bc77e9d34e2c",
      "name": "Check Database Connection",
      "type": "n8n-nodes-base.postgres",
      "typeVersion": 2.6,
      "position": [
        540,
        300
      ],
      "parameters": {
        "operation": "executeQuery",
        "query": "SELECT 1 as status",
        "options": {
          "connectionTimeout": 5
        }
      },
      "credentials": {},
      "onError": "continueErrorOutput"
    },
    {
      "id": "1039d50f-67cf-49fe-880e-7d3248c5c622",
      "name": "Build Unhealthy Response",
      "type": "n8n-nodes-base.set",
      "typeVersion": 3.4,
      "position": [
        840,
        400
      ],
      "parameters": {
        "mode": "manual",
        "assignments": {
          "assignments": [
            {
              "id": "1",
              "name": "status",
              "value": "unhealthy",
              "type": "string"
            },
            {
              "id": "2",
              "name": "timestamp",
              "value": "={{ $now.toISO() }}",
              "type": "string"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "160c661c-6b15-48e4-9b45-ce8af06d6db5",
      "name": "Return Unhealthy",
      "type": "n8n-nodes-base.respondToWebhook",
      "typeVersion": 1.5,
      "position": [
        1140,
        400
      ],
      "parameters": {
        "respondWith": "json",
        "responseBody": "={{ $json }}",
        "options": {
          "responseCode": 503
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "6bb7d237-0e61-4e55-8d3f-eca011945def",
      "name": "Build Healthy Response",
      "type": "n8n-nodes-base.set",
      "typeVersion": 3.4,
      "position": [
        840,
        200
      ],
      "parameters": {
        "mode": "manual",
        "assignments": {
          "assignments": [
            {
              "id": "1",
              "name": "status",
              "value": "healthy",
              "type": "string"
            },
            {
              "id": "2",
              "name": "timestamp",
              "value": "={{ $now.toISO() }}",
              "type": "string"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "27b5b105-6913-4a3d-8401-f09bd58572d1",
      "name": "Return Healthy",
      "type": "n8n-nodes-base.respondToWebhook",
      "typeVersion": 1.5,
      "position": [
        1140,
        200
      ],
      "parameters": {
        "respondWith": "json",
        "responseBody": "={{ $json }}"
      }
    }
  ],
  "connections": {
    "Health Check Endpoint": {
      "main": [
        [
          {
            "node": "Check Database Connection",
            "type": "main",
            "index": 0
          }
        ]
      ]
    },
    "Check Database Connection": {
      "main": [
        [
          {
            "node": "Build Healthy Response",
            "type": "main",
            "index": 0
          }
        ]
      ],
      "error": [
        [
          {
            "node": "Build Unhealthy Response",
            "type": "main",
            "index": 0
          }
        ]
      ]
    },
    "Build Unhealthy Response": {
      "main": [
        [
          {
            "node": "Return Unhealthy",
            "type": "main",
            "index": 0
          }
        ]
      ]
    },
    "Build Healthy Response": {

            "type": "main",
            "index": 0

      ]
    }
  },
  "settings": {},
  "pinData": {

}
